name: Brad Schneider
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $6,670,540 for Brad Schneider in U.S. House, IL-10. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby. Additional primary-source statements and voting records should continue to be incorporated over time.
